title: Fragment: 'The Rude Wind Is Singing'.
content:
The rude wind is singing
    The dirge of the music dead;
    The cold worms are clinging
    Where kisses were lately fed.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Percy Bysshe Shelley delivers a powerful performance in "Fragment: 'The Rude Wind Is Singing'."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
